title: eryngium × heteracanthum
intro: Eryngium × heteracanthum, also known as Miss Willmott's Ghost, is a hybrid flower plant in the genus Eryngium, resulting from the cross between Eryngium alpinum and Eryngium campestre. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help soothe and heal various health issues. The health benefits of Eryngium × heteracanthum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular herb in herbal medicine. Eryngium × heteracanthum can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, or used as a dried herb in capsules and supplements for its medicinal properties.
